raw_consumer_statement: The Problem is over a previous dispute ( Complaint ID XXXX ) I had with XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for a service I no longer wanted to my Citi Rewards credit card. When I initially received the charge on my Citi card for {$140.00} from XXXX, I called them up about the charges and they told me they would take care of the charges. To my surprise they billed me again for the same amount to my Citi card. I contacted Citi card about this, and they are giving me a hard time over this billing problem. It seems that they are telling me that they reversed the charge for the initial charge of {$140.00} but are trying to tell me the second charge of {$140.00} plus a {$30.00}. fee is from something else. If you would help me resolve this problem once and for all I would appreciate it. Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
